vehicles.title: Toyota Corolla 2010 - Great Condition
vehicles.description: Great condition Toyota Corolla. Just serviced. New tires. WOF until August 2025. Rego until December 2025. Selling as moving overseas. Urgent sale!

vehicles.title: Toyota Vitz 2011 - Low KMs
vehicles.description: 2011 Toyota Vitz in silver. Very reliable. Low kilometers for age. WOF Oct 2025. Must sell this week as bought new car.

vehicles.title: Toyota RAV4 2008 4WD
vehicles.description: Reliable RAV4 4WD. Tow bar. Roof racks. Some paint fade but mechanically good. WOF June 2025. Selling due to upgrade.

vehicles.title: Toyota Corolla 2005 - Reliable Daily Driver
vehicles.description: 2005 Corolla. Starts every time. Regular servicing. WOF March 2025. Good first car. Selling for daughter who went overseas.

vehicles.title: Toyota Corolla 2013 - Excellent Condition
vehicles.description: Immaculate 2013 Corolla. One owner. Full service history. 8x airbags. Bluetooth. Reverse camera. WOF Dec 2025. Moving overseas, quick sale needed!

vehicles.title: Toyota Vitz 2008 - Fuel Efficient
vehicles.description: Great fuel economy. Chain driven (no cambelt). Tidy interior. Some exterior marks. WOF July 2025. Selling as getting company car.

vehicles.title: Toyota RAV4 2006 - Great for Camping
vehicles.description: High km but well maintained. Recent brakes and tires. Perfect for camping trips. WOF May 2025. Need gone asap - leaving NZ.

vehicles.title: Toyota Corolla 2003 - Budget Option
vehicles.description: Cheap reliable transport. High kms but runs well. Recent service. WOF April 2025. Ideal for student or worker.

vehicles.title: Toyota Vitz 2012 - Lady Owner
vehicles.description: Lady owner, non-smoker. Excellent condition inside and out. Push button start. Keyless entry. WOF Nov 2025. Genuine reason for sale.

vehicles.title: Toyota Corolla 2007 Fielder Wagon
vehicles.description: Corolla Fielder wagon. Huge boot space. Perfect for tradesperson or family. Roof rails. WOF Sep 2025. New battery.
